member.translate: член, участник, представитель, деталь, звено, часть, партнер, элемент конструкции
mnemonic:
member ['mɛmbə]
Член, участник.
***
Каждого участника "member"
я лично помню "remember".

examples.eng: The club has 300 members.
examples.ru: В этом клубе состоит триста человек.

examples.eng: Turkey is not yet a full member of the EU.
examples.ru: Турция пока не является полноправным членом ЕС.

examples.eng: a member of the audience
Wolves and domestic dogs are members of the same species.
examples.ru: Волки и собаки являются представителями одного вида.

examples.eng: an active member of the club
The plant is a member of the lily family.
She's a new member of the staff.
a member of a trade mission
a respectable member of the community
examples.ru: достойный представитель общества / уважаемый член общества

examples.eng: a member of the upper caste
Canada is a member of the United Nations
examples.ru: Канада является членом Организации Объединенных Наций

examples.eng: a member of the royal bodyguard
She is a member of Parliament.
a member of the imperial family
a horizontal member of a bridge
She is a valuable member of the staff.
He is a member of the Catholic Church.
a member of the titled ranks
a member of a religious order
a retiring member of the board
examples.ru: член совета директоров, уходящий в отставку

examples.eng: a member of our clerical staff
a member of the moneyed classes
a skilled member of a ship's crew
He's a member of a Masonic lodge.
He is a member of a jazz quartet.
examples.ru: Он является одним из участников джаз-квартета.

examples.eng: He was a member of a Masonic lodge.
a member of the President's Cabinet
He's an honorary member of the club.
examples.ru: Он является почётным членом данного клуба.

examples.eng: an upstanding member of the community
the remit of a senior member of staff
